title: Gravity Shepherd
pitch: Your stats are moons in orbit — slingshot them at the void and feed them mass to grow your build.
howto: Moons orbit you, blocking bullets and grazing enemies. Drag a moon back and release to slingshot it, then feed collected mass to level moons mid-run: bigger hits harder but orbits slower. Earn stardust between runs for permanent levels, extra hearts and two new moon types.
controls: Drag empty space to move. Drag a moon and release to slingshot. Tap a moon card to feed it mass.
